description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of dark navy blue and white panels, with a large, light-colored 'N' logo prominently displayed on the side. The upper appears to be constructed from a mix of suede and mesh materials, providing both durability and breathability. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and a white midsole with a dark outsole for traction. The heel area displays the 'new balance' branding, and the lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A navy blue and white low-top sneaker with a large 'N' logo, suede and mesh upper, and standard laces. Features 'new balance' branding and a cushioned sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large 'N' logo, layered suede and mesh panels, and the white midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel, 'new balance' branding, and the curve of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the 'N' logo and visible heel support structure.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, lacing system, and tongue padding.
attribute_logo: Large 'N' on the side in light color; 'new balance' text on the heel in dark color.
